data.title: Amazon Tightens Grip As E-Commerce Accelerates: JPMorgan's 'Best Idea' For 2025
data.description: Amazon remains in the driver's seat of the U.S. e-commerce engine, with strong Q4 growth, expanding market share, and dominating logistics.

data.title: Lenovo Q3 Earnings: 20% Revenue Jump, AI PCs and Smartphones Power Market Expansion
data.description: Lenovo Group Ltd reported 20% Y/Y revenue growth in Q3, surpassing analyst estimates. All three business groups achieved double-digit growth.

data.title: Trump Approval Rating Declines In February: 'Unpopular Domestic And Foreign Policy Ideas'
data.description: A new voter poll finds Donald Trump's approval rating dipping in February. A look at the potential reasons why.

data.title: Hasbro Q4 Earnings: Beats Estimates, Slash Costs, Targets 750M Gamers & Fans By 2027
data.description: Shares of Hasbro are rising after the company reported better-than-expected Q4 results. Despite a 14% revenue decline to $1.102 billion, Hasbro exceeded analyst estimates.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Criticizes Blockchain 'Casinos,' Suggests Ethereum Won't Follow Solana's Approach To Meme Coins
